title: Cloud Hunt Foundation
description: Shared cloud-hunt building blocks for suspicious cloud control-plane and workload activity.

parameters.name: tenant
parameters.description: Tenant, account grouping, or environment selector.

parameters.name: lookback_hours
parameters.description: Hours of cloud telemetry to review.

parameters.name: focus_principal
parameters.description: Optional cloud principal, role, or service account to prioritize.

parameters.name: focus_resource
parameters.description: Optional cloud resource name or identifier to prioritize.

telemetry_requirements.description: Control-plane audit logs for identity, policy, and resource modifications.
SIEM correlation for cloud control-plane events and cross-tenant pivots.

blind_spots: Cloud resources that do not emit centralized audit logs or cross-account telemetry will reduce visibility.
